response.original_title: [[--Troubleshooting Guide--]] How do you unlock your Kraken?
response.overview: ⭐1-830-745-0056 If you’re asking Why is my Kraken account locked?, it’s often due to security protection. Kraken may lock your account if there are too many failed login attempts, a new device login, or unusual activity. This is done to keep your funds safe. To fix it, reset your password ⭐1-830-745-0056 and verify your identity. If the issue continues, contact 1 888-Kraken ⭐1-830-745-0056 ) [@ Kraken] +⭐1-830-745-0056 for quick support. Answer 2 Another common reason Why is my Kraken account locked? is incomplete or pending verification +⭐1-830-745-0056 . Kraken requires users to submit valid ID documents.
